prompt_inputs.goal: maintain current weight while sustaining energy for daily training and competition
prompt_inputs.restrictions: vegetarian, no nuts due to allergy

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals for one day
Meals are calorie-balanced to support training without weight gain
All meals respect vegetarian diet and nut-free requirements
Plan is concise and practical for a single athlete to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport requiring weight management (gymnast/dancer) with calorie-conscious meals that maintain energy while staying within specific weight targets

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-intensity endurance athlete requiring 4000+ calories with carbohydrate loading and optimal hydration

solution_criteria: Total daily caloric intake meets or exceeds 4000 calories
Carbohydrates comprise 60-70% of total calories to support endurance performance
Includes hydration strategy with at least 3 liters of fluid intake throughout the day
Meal plan is formatted as a single day with distinct meals/snacks
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 4000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration

prompt_inputs.goal: Strength and power development for weightlifting competition in 8 weeks

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day with strategic timing around workout
Protein intake is elevated (approximately 1.6-2.2g per kg bodyweight) and distributed across meals
Includes pre-workout and post-workout nutrition recommendations with specific timing
Macronutrient composition supports strength/power goals with balanced carbohydrates and healthy fats
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing balanced macronutrients with higher protein intake and strategic meal timing around workouts

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and improve endurance for competitive cycling

solution_criteria: All meals are vegetarian and gluten-free with no animal products or gluten-containing ingredients
Plan includes adequate protein intake (~1.6-2.0g per kg body weight) from plant-based sources to support muscle building
Meals are compact and concise (brief descriptions), suitable for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete having multiple dietary restrictions (vegetarian + gluten-free) to verify the plan accommodates constraints while meeting nutritional needs

prompt_inputs.goal: Peak performance for 6 AM track competition (800m race)

solution_criteria: Includes pre-dawn meal timed 2-3 hours before competition with easily digestible carbohydrates and protein
All meals respect lactose-free and nut-free restrictions
Plan is compact and covers only 1 day with clear timing for competition preparation
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an early morning competition athlete requiring a pre-dawn meal plan with easily digestible foods and timing considerations for performance
